name: structural-overlap-ejection
description: Verify only a detached structural block overlapping the character shatters without moving the character or opening intact wall space.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local intact=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01') root.CFrame=intact.CFrame root.Anchored=true task.wait(0.45) local result={intactAnchored=intact.Anchored,intactBroken=intact:GetAttribute('Broken'),intactDetached=intact:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),overlapEjects=workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute('LastCharacterOverlapEjectCount') or 0} root.Anchored=false return H:JSONEncode(result)

steps.label: intact wall stays anchored when overlapped

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=7,row=1}) task.wait(0.35) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02') assert(target,'missing detached target block') root.CFrame=target.CFrame root.Anchored=true local before=root.Position task.wait(0.45) local result={before=tostring(before),after=tostring(root.Position),drift=(root.Position-before).Magnitude,broken=target:GetAttribute('Broken'),detached=target:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),shatterAt=target:GetAttribute('LastOverlapShatterAt') or 0,rootAnchored=root.Anchored} root.Anchored=false return H:JSONEncode(result)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02') return H:JSONEncode({broken=target:GetAttribute('Broken'),detached=target:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),shatterAt=target:GetAttribute('LastOverlapShatterAt') or 0,rootAnchored=root.Anchored})

steps.label: detached overlap shatters without moving player
